summary: Iteration 146 - Client Personal Info features (TFN, ID docs, custom fields, Xplan sync) fully tested. Backend: 20/20 tests passed after fixing route ordering bug. Frontend: Profile tab, Client Setup Wizard, and New Client navigation all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Route ordering bug in client_personal_info.py - /setup route was after /{client_id} causing 'setup' to be treated as client_id. Moved /setup before parameterized routes.
Encryption service (AES-256-GCM) working correctly - TFN and ID numbers encrypted at rest, decrypted on demand
TFN masking format correct: ***-***-XXX (last 3 digits visible)
ID number masking correct: shows last 4 characters only
Xplan sync (MOCKED) working - bidirectional sync with mock data for XP-001, XP-002, XP-003
Client ID mapping: thompson_family -> XP-002, james_mitchell -> XP-001, michael_chen -> XP-003
seed_data_creation: Test clients created with TEST_ prefix during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client Personal Info features fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: POST/GET /api/client-personal-info/{client_id}, GET /api/client-personal-info/{client_id}/unmasked, POST /api/client-personal-info/{client_id}/xplan-sync, GET /api/client-personal-info/{client_id}/xplan-status, POST /api/client-personal-info/setup. Xplan sync is MOCKED - returns fake data for known client IDs.

backend_save_personal_info.details: POST /api/client-personal-info/{client_id} saves TFN (encrypted), ID documents (encrypted), custom fields. Returns masked TFN and counts.

backend_get_masked_data.details: GET /api/client-personal-info/{client_id} returns masked TFN (***-***-XXX) and masked ID numbers (last 4 chars visible).

backend_get_unmasked_data.details: GET /api/client-personal-info/{client_id}/unmasked returns decrypted TFN and ID numbers. Returns 404 for non-existent clients.

backend_xplan_sync.details: POST /api/client-personal-info/{client_id}/xplan-sync triggers bidirectional sync (MOCKED). thompson_family maps to XP-002.

backend_xplan_status.details: GET /api/client-personal-info/{client_id}/xplan-status returns sync status and history (last 5 entries).

backend_client_setup.details: POST /api/client-personal-info/setup creates new client with all fields. Returns status='created', client_id, masked TFN.

frontend_profile_tab_exists.details: Profile tab (data-testid='client-tab-profile') exists in Adviser Client Overview between Actions and Retirement tabs.

frontend_profile_tab_content.details: Profile tab shows TFN input, ID documents section, custom fields section, Xplan sync banner with status.

frontend_profile_add_id.details: Add ID button (data-testid='add-id-btn') adds new ID document form. Can select type, enter number, expiry, authority.

frontend_profile_add_custom_field.details: Add Field button (data-testid='add-custom-field-btn') adds new custom field form with label and value inputs.

frontend_profile_save.details: Save Personal Information button (data-testid='save-personal-info-btn') saves data and shows success toast.

frontend_profile_xplan_sync.details: Sync with Xplan button (data-testid='xplan-sync-btn') triggers sync and shows 'Xplan sync complete — bidirectional' toast.

frontend_client_setup_wizard.details: 4-step wizard at /client-setup: Step 1 (Personal Details with first/last name required), Step 2 (TFN & ID), Step 3 (Additional Fields), Step 4 (Review & Submit).

frontend_wizard_navigation.details: Next/Previous buttons work correctly. Previous disabled on Step 1. Submit button appears on Step 4.

frontend_new_client_sidebar.details: New Client link exists in adviser sidebar under CRM section with 'NEW' badge. Links to /client-setup.

frontend_new_client_header_button.details: + New Client button exists in Client Hub header for quick access to client setup wizard.

mocked_apis_list: Xplan bidirectional sync - returns mock TFN/ID data for XP-001, XP-002, XP-003
Client ID mapping: thompson_family -> XP-002, james_mitchell -> XP-001, michael_chen -> XP-003

bug_fixed.issue: FastAPI route ordering bug - /setup endpoint was being matched by /{client_id} pattern
bug_fixed.root_cause: In FastAPI, specific routes must be defined before parameterized routes. /setup was defined after /{client_id}.
